mapper.select: SELECT * FROM camera_config ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO camera_config (camera_code, camera_name, enterprise, artemis_device_id, rtsp_url, location, enabled) KEY (camera_code) VALUES (#{cameraCode}, #{cameraName}, #{enterprise}, #{artemisDeviceId}, #{rtspUrl}, #{location}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE camera_config SET camera_name = #{cameraName}, enterprise = #{enterprise}, artemis_device_id = #{artemisDeviceId}, rtsp_url = #{rtspUrl}, location = #{location}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM camera_config WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM camera_config WHERE enabled = 1
